Command.Name: OpenIV Red Circle Error
Command.Title: Unable to Drag and Drop in OpenIV.
Command.Description:
Not being able to drag and drop files into your main directory via OpenIV can be frustrating. Please try the solutions below to resolve it 
1. Make sure **Edit Mode** is enabled. 
2. Use **WinRAR** instead of **Windows Explorer**. 
3. Drag the file to the desktop first, then into OpenIV.
